calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: A. Howell.
Michael Lieberman, Esq. for and with Plaintiff: Bharat Shah.
Plaintiff's Witness Bhavik Shah was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Daryl Woodard.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2766 Mission St., #108, San Francisco, CA 94110.
The lease is forfeited.
Back-Rent and Holdover Damages - $2,606.89
Costs - $240.00
Total - $2,846.89
Counsel to prepare Judgment and submit to Dept. 514 for signature.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-09-2011 Continued To Jun-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2011 Off Calendar
